engagementShape: fixed-scope discovery sprint (2 weeks), with optional implementation phase
introContext: AECTech 2026 — sponsor or exhibitor; first conversation.
callObjective: Identify one concrete pain in Deltek's AI / data roadmap that Arvaya can credibly accelerate, then decide whether a 2-week discovery sprint is worth proposing.
hypothesis: Deltek has shipped its core product but is now under pressure to add AI-native capabilities. The applied-ML / data org is likely thin relative to the roadmap, so build-vs-partner is live.
meetingContext: First conversation. Deltek is on the AECTech 2026 exhibitor list. Use the brief to find a credible wedge before the meeting.
description: Global provider of enterprise software and information solutions for project-based businesses, including Ajera and Vantagepoint for AEC.
